summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ticket comment attachments feature. All backend APIs (14 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly for both admin and employee roles.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments-with-attachments endpoint properly handles multipart form data with files
Backend: File size validation (25MB per file, 50MB total per comment) implemented correctly
Backend: Attachments stored in /app/uploads/tickets directory with unique filenames
Backend: Comment attachments properly returned in GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments response
Frontend Admin: Attach file button visible with data-testid='ticket-attach-file-btn'
Frontend Admin: Comment input has data-testid='ticket-comment-input'
Frontend Admin: Send button has data-testid='ticket-send-comment-btn'
Frontend Employee: Attach file button visible with text 'Attach files (max 25MB each)'
Frontend Employee: Send button has data-testid='employee-send-comment-btn'
Frontend: Attachment links displayed in comments with proper download URLs
updated_files: /app/tests/test_ticket_attachments.py - Created new test file for attachment feature
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets and comments with attachments during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket comment attachments feature fully tested and working. Key test points verified: 1) POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments-with-attachments accepts multipart form data with 'content', 'is_internal', and 'files' fields, 2) Admin can add comments with attachments and internal notes with attachments, 3) Employee can add comments with single or multiple attachments, 4) Attachments are displayed in comment list with download links, 5) File size limit is 25MB per file, 6) Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing: ticket-comment-input, ticket-attach-file-btn, ticket-send-comment-btn (admin), employee-ticket-comment-input, employee-send-comment-btn (employee)

admin_login.details: Admin can login with admin@company.com / password123

admin_ticket_listing.details: GET /api/tickets returns all tickets for admin

admin_comment_with_attachment.details: POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments-with-attachments saves file and returns attachment info

admin_internal_note_with_attachment.details: Internal notes with attachments work correctly (is_internal=true)

admin_view_attachments.details: GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments returns attachments array in each comment

employee_login.details: Employee can login with employee@test.com / password123

employee_create_ticket.details: POST /api/tickets creates ticket with auto-generated ticket number

employee_comment_with_attachment.details: POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments-with-attachments saves file and returns attachment info

employee_multiple_attachments.details: Multiple files can be uploaded in a single comment

employee_view_attachments.details: GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments returns attachments array in each comment

frontend_admin_ui.details: Admin ticket detail panel shows comment input, attach file button, send button, and attachment links

frontend_employee_ui.details: Employee ticket detail panel shows comment input, attach file button, send button, and attachment links

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Both admin and employee login working
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets: PASS - Returns tickets based on user role
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/tickets: PASS - Creates ticket with auto-generated ticket number
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments-with-att: PASS - Adds comment with file attachments
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments: PASS - Returns comments with attachments array
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets/attachments/{filename}: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent files (endpoint exists)
